title: Property Consultant - MagicBricks - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - MagicBricks - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Property Consultant looking for your next big career move? MagicBricks in Raipur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About MagicBricks:
MagicBricks is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Market Research

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MagicBricks!
